hypothesis: x greater than zero implies x plus one greater than zero
sum of two positives is positive
proof:
(set-logic QF_LIA)
(declare-const a Int)(declare-const b Int)
(assert (> a 0))(assert (> b 0))(assert (not (> (+ a b) 0)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: if a less than b and b less than c then a less than c
proof:
(set-logic QF_LIA)
(declare-const a Int)(declare-const b Int)(declare-const c Int)
(assert (< a b))(assert (< b c))(assert (not (< a c)))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: x squared is non-negative for reals

proof:
(set-logic QF_LIA)
(declare-const x Int)(declare-const y Int)
(assert (not (= (+ x y) (+ y x))))
(check-sat)

hypothesis: even x implies even x squared
proof:
(set-logic QF_LIA)
(declare-const x Int)
(assert (= (mod x 2) 0))(assert (not (= (mod (* x x) 2) 0)))
(check-sat)
